LBL_COVER_ALIGNED: Aligned to the EU AI Act.
LBL_CL_01_P1_POST: compliant with the EU AI Act and protects the trust our community places in us.
LBL_CL_01_LEAD: Applies to all staff, contractors and interns, and to AI built into tools we already run.
LBL_DUTY_01_D: Finish the 30-minute AI literacy module within 30 days of joining; refresh yearly.
LBL_DUTY_01_REF: EU AI Act, Art. 4 · in force Feb 2025
LBL_DUTY_02_D: Run company work through the Approved AI Tools list (clause 5). No personal accounts, no shadow AI.
LBL_DUTY_03_D: If AI output is wrong, biased, harmful, leaked or risky, report to the AI Officer before close of business.
LBL_PROH_FULL: Full prohibited list → EU AI Act, Article 5 ·
LBL_CL_04: What you can use with what data
LBL_MX_INTERNAL_D: Approved tools only. No consumer or free-tier tools.
LBL_MX_CONFID_D: enterprise tools only, with DPA on file.
LBL_MX_SPECIAL_D: only, with manager or AI Officer approval per use.
LBL_CL_05_LEAD_1: airlock is the only approved proxy connector.
LBL_CL_05_LEAD_2: Every other connector sits behind it: one URL, policy set once, every call audited.
LBL_REG_NOTE_POST: · request new connectors via the AI Officer.
LBL_CL_06: Always tell people when AI is involved
LBL_CL_06_P1_MID: AI-generated images, audio or video that could be mistaken for real carry an
LBL_CL_06_P2: A candidate, partner or user affected by an AI-supported decision is told, and offered a human review on request.
LBL_CL_07: You stay accountable for what you ship
LBL_CL_07_P: AI is a draft. You verify before sending, publishing, deploying or signing off.
LBL_CL_07_LEAD_PRE: “The AI did it” is not a defence at
LBL_CL_08_P1: Do not paste anything into AI that you would not post publicly, unless the tool is Tier 1. Confidential business documents are Tier 1 by default.
LBL_CL_08_P2_POST: property where the law allows. Tell your manager when a deliverable is AI-assisted.
LBL_CL_09_PRE: Output that's wrong, biased, harmful or leaked, or that could embarrass
LBL_CL_09_MID: or harm someone, goes to the
LBL_CL_09_POST: before close of business, with what you did, what it produced and what data was involved.
LBL_CL_10_PRE: Breach of this policy is treated under the
LBL_CL_10_POST: disciplinary code, up to and including termination, and referral to authorities where required by law.
LBL_DPO_FALLBACK: Until appointed, route to the AI Officer.
LBL_CL_11_LEAD_2: It is always cheaper than a leaked deck or a regulator's letter.
LBL_CL_12_BIG_PRE: By continuing to use AI tools for
LBL_CL_12_META_POST: , or sooner after any incident or significant regulatory change.
ART5_RULES: No social scoring of staff, customers or users.
No emotion or mood detection in the workplace.
No deepfakes of real people without consent.
HOUSE_RULES_DEFAULT: No AI as sole decision-maker for hiring, performance, promotion or termination. A human always decides.
No customer, partner, employee or financial data in a tool that isn't approved.
No personal accounts (free ChatGPT, free Gemini, etc.) for company work.
No third-party AI on confidential business material without written consent.
